calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Kevin Navarro.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40:38 a.m. and concluding at 10:16:02 a.m.

Claudia Estrada Esq. Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC.
Defendant Kevin Navarro not appearing.

MATTHEW ROBERTS is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Bill of sale.
Exhibit B: Affidavit of sale.
Exhibit C: Citibank Statements dated 3/25/2015 - 3/23/2016

Plaintiff's Exhibits A,B,& C are ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC. and against Defendant Kevin Navarro as follows:

Damages/Principal: $5,262.87
Costs: $325.00
Total Judgment: $5,587.87

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court. (D505)

MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Feb-10-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Claudia Estrada, Esq. (559.418.0333) of Quall Cardot LLP for Plaintiff.
David George, Esq. (925.315.5671) Moving Party (audio only).

Ms. Estrada stated she has no objections to this motion.

In-Camera-Review Hearing held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for DEFENDANT KEVIN NAVARRO is GRANTED.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
